title: Candyy
description: Polishing minecraft to look aesthetically pleasing with simple mods and resourcepacks, all about eye candy. (client-side)
body:
![banner 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/766fd7478dd36e63f3f680a5edd5e2c00c100711_0.webp)
 Picture taken with Candyy on [✠ Barony RagnarStein ✠ map](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/medieval-defensible-realistic-castle/) by [Ragnar le Rouge](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ragnar_le_rouge/).

# Overview

Polishing minecraft to **_improve the visual and sound experience_** with simple mods and resourcepacks with some Qol changes on the side, all client-side.

**Performance** is very important for the smoothness of the game, so all performance mods you might want are installed. Based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop). For extra performace i also use: [JVM Arguments](https://exa.y2k.diy/garden/jvm-args/)

When i play, **I like to be immersed**, so dynamic sounds to blocks during rain fall, the clouds are fluffy and dynamic to light. The inventory has items interactions animations and hotbar is soooooo smooth like butter. Some items and blocks have more particles or trails like arrows and elytras.

Most important of all i like to take photos of my world so all resourcepacks are to extend those colors i like to see, and **Picture mode** for cool perspectives.

![colagge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813298dd6ab17bc630a9309127d80b9876b507c9.jpeg)

## Notes

One of the mods that I recommend changing the values to your liking is **[simple fog control](https://modrinth.com/project/Glp1bwYc)** (_when playing at low render distances it doesn't look as good_). Disabling "_terrain fog modification_" does it for me.

Compatible with **[voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy)** you can add it yourself. [voxy support for Simple fog control](https://github.com/Draradech/SimpleFogControl/issues/22#issuecomment-3678670229)

> ### Known issues:
> About **[Better Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities)** (BBE): Some known mods that do not work with BBE fully enabled are Traben’s **[EMF] Entity Model Features** / **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** mods. If you want these to work alongside BBE, you will have to turn off optimizations for the block entity you want EMF/ETF to modify through our config screen. The same goes for resource packs that modify any of the enabled block entities.

> **Perception** trails bugs on some non-vanilla servers.

> If you are playing on low render distances (<20), I recommend **_disabling nvidium_** in sodium settings. Can have some performance regresion at lower render distances.

> **Picture mode** not compatible with **nvidium**.


###### _*not included in the modpack past this point_ 

## Mod/rp recommendations to add

**_moar dynamic mods_**
> - ⭐[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) or [Locomotion](https://github.com/Trainguy9512/locomotion)
> - ⭐[ATMOSPHERICS](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospherics)
> - [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain)
> - [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)
> - [The Immersive Music Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivemusicmod/versions) or [Atmosfera](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmosfera)
> - [Vectorientation](https://modrinth.com/mod/vectorientation)
> - [Telepistons](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepistons)
> - [Cold Breath](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-breath)
> - [Shine](https://modrinth.com/mod/shine)

_**Resourcepacks**_
> - ⭐[Vintage resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vintage)
> - ⭐[Beta 1.7.3 Lighting](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/beta-1-7-3-lighting/)
> - ⭐[Tasty Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tasty-items)
> - [Sunbathing Godrays](https://modrinth.com/project/YSIJ1xkc)
> - [Vanilla Emissives](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-emissives)
> - [Fluffy Carpets and Wool](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fluffy-carpets)
> - [Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books)
> - [Light Leak](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/light-leak)



### Backstory of the project
I was trying some maps from planetminecraft and [✠ Barony RagnarStein ✠](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/medieval-defensible-realistic-castle/) was one of my favorites. I enjoy so much walking around and looking at the details, trees flowing with the wind, churches with intiriors and the atmosphere is so medieval, even without ashen or excalibur resoucepacks, overall i recommend visiting [ᛟ Windfall Haven ᛟ](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/medieval-island-3950300/) and all of his others maps from 8 years ago, pure talent.
- [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen)
- [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) | [Clarent Edition](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clarent)
